description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is predominantly white, with a large expanse of green lawn and a rectangular blue swimming pool at one end. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by slender columns, wide steps leading up to the entry, and large glass windows that provide ample natural light. One side of the house is accented with horizontal wooden slats, adding warmth and texture to the otherwise sleek exterior. The rear and side elevations are more closed, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The property is enclosed by a low white perimeter wall, creating a defined boundary for the house and its outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with large windows, a green lawn, and a blue swimming pool, accented by wooden slats and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, covered porch, large windows, green lawn, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear view with a mostly solid white wall, minimal window openings, and the green lawn visible inside the perimeter.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the covered porch, supporting columns, entry steps, and the long stretch of green lawn leading to the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden slat accent, a cantilevered section, and the pool at the far end of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide steps leading to a covered porch with slender columns and a flat overhang, featuring a large glass entry door.
